_comment: CEC chrome-only brand profile. Machine-readable public-page-element rules for svg_quality_checker.py, Strategist, Executor, finalize_svg.py, and native PPTX export.
brand_id: 中电联公共元素_轻量版

page_protected_regions.description: Normal page text must not enter the master logo protection area.
Normal page text must not enter the master footer bar area.

body_pages.description: Recommended body content region. Content may use the title area above it only for page title and subtitle.

cover_title_region.description: Recommended cover title and subtitle region on the upper white field.

cover_meta_region.description: Recommended cover metadata region on the lower navy band.

cover_base.usage: Use as an optional full-bleed cover background for formal CEC-facing decks.
cover_base.non_derivation_rule: Do not derive content palette, typography, icon style, chart colors, or body-page visual style from cover_bg.jpg. The red line and navy band belong to the cover base only.

cover.content_policy: Brand cover page template for project title, subtitle, author or unit, and date. Replace placeholders only; do not derive body-page colors or layout from this page.

ending.content_policy: Generic closing page template. Use for formal ending pages; do not add project-specific conclusions, next steps, or content bullets unless the user explicitly requests them.

runtime_policy.strategist_behavior: Treat chrome fills as fixed public-element colors only. Choose content palette, typography, icons, and visual style through the normal Eight Confirmations.
